tool_result.content:
{"result":"The CI `ruff-docstrings` job failed with 13 errors across three files, all related to incomplete docstrings on functions modified or created as part of the system/project prompt implementation (Issue #648). The `mypy` job also failed but is not analyzed here.

The errors fall into two categories. First, seven D417 ("Missing argument description") errors where new parameters were added to existing functions but their docstrings were not updated to document them. Specifically: `ask_claude_code_cli` in `src/mcp_coder/llm/providers/claude/claude_code_cli.py` is missing descriptions for the new `append_system_prompt` and `system_prompt_replace` parameters; `ask_langchain` in `src/mcp_coder/llm/providers/langchain/__init__.py` is missing `project_prompt` and `system_prompt`; and `_ask_text`, `_ask_agent`, `_ask_agent_stream` (same file) plus `run_agent` and `run_agent_stream` in `src/mcp_coder/llm/providers/langchain/agent.py` are all missing the `system_messages` parameter description.

Second, six DOC201 ("return is not documented") errors in the newly created `src/mcp_coder/prompts/prompt_loader.py`. All six public functions (`_read_shipped_default`, `_resolve_configured_prompt`, `load_system_prompt`, `load_project_prompt`, `get_project_prompt_path`, `is_claude_md`) have return statements but lack a formal "Returns" section in their docstrings.

To fix, add the missing `Args` entries for the new parameters in `claude_code_cli.py`, `langchain/__init__.py`, and `langchain/agent.py`, and add proper `Returns` sections to all six function docstrings in `prompt_loader.py`.
"}

structuredContent.result:
The CI `ruff-docstrings` job failed with 13 errors across three files, all related to incomplete docstrings on functions modified or created as part of the system/project prompt implementation (Issue #648). The `mypy` job also failed but is not analyzed here.

The errors fall into two categories. First, seven D417 ("Missing argument description") errors where new parameters were added to existing functions but their docstrings were not updated to document them. Specifically: `ask_claude_code_cli` in `src/mcp_coder/llm/providers/claude/claude_code_cli.py` is missing descriptions for the new `append_system_prompt` and `system_prompt_replace` parameters; `ask_langchain` in `src/mcp_coder/llm/providers/langchain/__init__.py` is missing `project_prompt` and `system_prompt`; and `_ask_text`, `_ask_agent`, `_ask_agent_stream` (same file) plus `run_agent` and `run_agent_stream` in `src/mcp_coder/llm/providers/langchain/agent.py` are all missing the `system_messages` parameter description.

Second, six DOC201 ("return is not documented") errors in the newly created `src/mcp_coder/prompts/prompt_loader.py`. All six public functions (`_read_shipped_default`, `_resolve_configured_prompt`, `load_system_prompt`, `load_project_prompt`, `get_project_prompt_path`, `is_claude_md`) have return statements but lack a formal "Returns" section in their docstrings.

To fix, add the missing `Args` entries for the new parameters in `claude_code_cli.py`, `langchain/__init__.py`, and `langchain/agent.py`, and add proper `Returns` sections to all six function docstrings in `prompt_loader.py`.
